zh.Litcham, Mitford, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可利其哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Hoo於大約1315年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可利其哈姆時，他的父親Robert Hoo42歲，母親Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo39歲。他於1335年6月16日與Isabel St Leger在英國貝德福爾盧頓 胡結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1380年9月28日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾希欽享年66歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Hoo于大约1315年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可利其哈姆时，他的父亲Robert Hoo42岁，母亲Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo39岁。他于1335年6月16日与Isabel St Leger在英国貝德福爾盧頓 胡结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1380年9月28日在英国英格兰賀特福爾希欽享年66岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hoo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Wai Lam, Wing, Beng, Chin, Gan, Hing, Hui, Kee, Lai, Lai Ching, Mei-Mei.
variant Romanization of the surname   Hu  .

variants.name: Hu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Ming, Ping, Bin, Yi, Ying, Jing, Xiao, Qi, Yan, Chi.  Korean Chang, Chung, Min, Yiping, Chong, Chul, Hu, Jung Soo, Sang Hoon, Tian, Wook, Yiming.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 胡, a term referring to the ethnic minorities in ancient northern and western China: (i) from Hu (胡), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Henan province) during the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771 BC ). After it was annexed by the state of Zheng (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) in the 26th year of the reign of King Ping of Zhou (died 720 BC ), people from the fief adopted 胡, the name of the state, as their surname. (ii) from Hu (胡), the name of a state (located in present-day Anhui province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu in the 15th year of the reign of Duke Ding of Lu (ruler of the state of Lu, reigned 509–495 BC ), people from the fief adopted 胡, the name of the state, as their surname. (iii) from the personal name of Hu Gong Man (胡公满, Duke Hu of Chen), the posthumous title of Yu Man. He was given the fief of Chen (located mainly in present-day Henan and Anhui province) by King Wu of Zhou (c. 1087–1043 BC ). (iv) from the personal name of Hu Guang (胡廣), who changed his original surname 黃 to 胡 during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ). (v) from the Hu Gu (胡骨) or He Gu (纥骨) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their surname to 胡 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534 AD ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 扈, meaning ‘retinue’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Hu (扈), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Shaanxi province) dating back to the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ) (ii) adopted as a surname by the Hu Di Gan (扈地干) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Hoo was born about 1315, in Litcham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Hoo, was 42 and his mother, Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, was 39. He married Isabel St Leger on 16 June 1335, in Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 28 September 1380, in Hitchin, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Hoo est né environ 1315, à Litcham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Hoo, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Isabel St Leger le 16 juin 1335, à Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 septembre 1380, à Hitchin, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Hoo um 1315 in Litcham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Hoo 42 und seine Mutter Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo 39. Er hat am 16. Juni 1335 in Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England Isabel St Leger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. September 1380 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Hitchin, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Hoo è nato il circa 1315 nel Litcham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Hoo, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Isabel St Leger il 16 giugno 1335, nel Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 settembre 1380, nel Hitchin, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Hooが約1315年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクリトチャムで生まれた時，父Robert Hooは42歳，母Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hooは39歳であった。1335年6月16日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアルトン ホーオでIsabel St Legerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1380年9月28日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアヒトチンで66歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Hoo(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리트챔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Hoo(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1335년 6월 16일 영국 베드퍼드실르 루턴 후에서 Isabel St Leger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1380년 9월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 히트친에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Hoo nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Litcham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Hoo, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel St Leger em 16 de junho de 1335, em Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1380, em Hitchin, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England: Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Hoo родился около 1315 г. в местности личам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Hoo было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel St Leger 16 июня 1335 г. в местности лутон ху, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 сентября 1380 г. в местности хичин, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Hoo nació aproximadamente 1315, en Litcham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Hoo, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Lady Hawise FitzWarin Baroness Hoo, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Isabel St Leger el 16 de junio de 1335, en Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1380, en Hitchin, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
